summary: Frontend testing completed for Enjoy page staggered entrance animations and mobile responsive design. All 13 requested features verified working.

enjoy_page_hero_section.details: Hero section loads with 'Adventures Worth Wagging For' headline, gradient background, and CTA buttons
verified_elements: Trust indicators (Pet-Safe Venues, 500+ Events Hosted, Community Approved)

cta_buttons_responsive.details: Both CTA buttons are visible and functional on desktop and mobile

animation_keyframes.details: CSS keyframes for fadeInUp, scaleIn, and slideInLeft animations are present in page styles

goal_buttons_staggered_animations.details: 8 goal buttons have staggered scale-in animations

goal_buttons_responsive_grid.details: Goal buttons display in 2x2 grid on mobile (390px) and 4-column on desktop

quick_tip_section.details: Quick Tip section is visible and properly styled with red/rose gradient background
quick_tip_section.content: Start with calm, low-stimulation events if your pet is new to social gatherings. Build confidence gradually!

transformation_stories_animations.details: 4 transformation story cards have staggered fade-in-up animations

concierge_experience_cards_animations.details: 4 Concierge Experience cards have staggered fade-in-up animations

events_filter_scrollable_mobile.details: Events filter buttons are horizontally scrollable on mobile
events_filter_scrollable_mobile.css_class: overflow-x-auto pb-2 -mx-4 px-4 sm:mx-0 sm:px-0 sm:overflow-visible scrollbar-hide

event_cards_animations.details: Event cards have staggered fade-in-up animations

products_section_animations.details: Products section has staggered scale-in animations on product cards

mobile_bottom_navigation.details: Mobile bottom navigation bar is visible on Enjoy page

mobile_responsive_390px.details: Page is fully responsive at 390px width

verified_layouts.hero_section: Full width with stacked CTA buttons

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 Enjoy page features verified working: (1) Hero section with 'Adventures Worth Wagging For' headline, (2) Find Experiences and Browse Events CTAs responsive and functional, (3) Animation keyframes (fadeInUp, scaleIn, slideInLeft) present in styles, (4) 8 goal buttons with staggered scale-in animations, (5) Goal buttons 2x2 grid on mobile, 4-column on desktop, (6) Quick Tip section visible, (7) 4 Transformation Stories with staggered fade-in-up, (8) 4 Concierge Experience cards with staggered animations, (9) Events filter buttons scrollable on mobile, (10) Event cards with staggered fade-in-up, (11) Products section with staggered scale-in, (12) Mobile bottom navigation bar visible, (13) Page fully responsive at 390px width.
